name: @aqua/plugin-kanban
description: Aqua portal kanban plugin — generic, editable boards (columns + cards) with 4 install-time templates (fulfillment-mirror / lead-pipeline / client-tasks / blank). scopePolicy: 'either' — works at agency or per-client. No required deps. Coexists with fulfillment's rigid phase-board (additive, not a replacement).
